en: This guy says hello and I wanna kill myself.
zh: 这家伙一说“嗨”，我都想原地去世了。

en: I just feel like someone reached down my throat, grabbed my small intestine, pulled it out of my mouth and tied it around my neck.
zh: 我感觉就像有人把手伸进我喉咙，抓住我的小肠，从嘴里拽出来，然后绕在我脖子上。

en: Carol moved her stuff out today.
zh: Carol今天把她的东西都搬走了。
